summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blog and Community features. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Blog page, Blog detail page, Community page, Community post detail page, and Admin CMS sections for Blog and Community management.
seed_data_creation: 3 blog posts and 2 community posts already exist (created by previous iterations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog and Community features fully tested. Backend APIs: GET /api/blog, GET /api/blog/{id}, POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/blog, GET /api/community, GET /api/community/{id}, POST /api/community, POST /api/community/{id}/reply, POST /api/community/{id}/like, PUT /api/admin/community/{id}/pin, DELETE /api/admin/community/{id}. Frontend: /blog and /community pages accessible from navbar. Admin CMS has Blog under 'Contenu' group and Community under 'Communauté' group.

backend_blog_public.GET /api/blog: PASS - Returns published posts with total count
backend_blog_public.GET /api/blog/{id}: PASS - Returns post with views increment

backend_community_public.GET /api/community: PASS - Returns posts sorted by pinned then date

frontend_blog./blog_page: PASS - Shows articles with categories and search

frontend_community./community/{id}: PASS - Shows discussion with replies and reply form

frontend_admin_cms.blog_in_contenu_group: PASS - Blog item under Contenu sidebar group
frontend_admin_cms.blog_admin_section: PASS - Shows 3 articles with edit/delete actions
frontend_admin_cms.community_in_communaute_group: PASS - Discussions item under Communauté sidebar group
